# Cloudflare R2 (REST)

| | |
| --- | --- |
| **Import** | `@harryy/ai-tools/r2` |
| **Kind** | **vendor** (`src/vendors/r2`) |
| **Module id** | `r2` |
| **Client** | `R2Client` |
| **Transport** | Cloudflare REST (`api.cloudflare.com`) |

R2 objects via the Cloudflare REST API. For the **S3-compatible** R2 endpoint (presign, multipart), use [s3](./s3.md) with `endpoint`.

## Auth

```ts
{
  account_id: string
  api_token: string
  bucket: string
  jurisdiction?: 'default' | 'eu' | 'fedramp'
}
```

## Tools

`r2-list-objects`, `r2-get-object`, `r2-put-object`, `r2-delete-object`, `r2-head-object`, `r2-copy-object`.

Signed URLs and multipart are **unsupported** on this path.

## Bind

```ts
import { R2Client, r2Module } from '@harryy/ai-tools/r2'
import { withAuth } from '@harryy/ai-tools/core'

new R2Client({ account_id: '…', api_token: '…', bucket: '…' })
withAuth(r2Module, { account_id: '…', api_token: '…', bucket: '…' })
```

Seam: [storage](../modules/storage.md) with `provider: 'r2'`.
